author: desiderium-wav
name: Uwulock
description: Commands for converting user messages to UWU speak via webhooks. Allows admins to mark users for automatic UWU-fication with support for bulk operations.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs of UWU-locked users per guild in memory. It also maintains a webhook cache for channels. Data is not persisted and is lost on bot restart.
